title: Machines built to remove uncertainty from industrial production.
body: Welden builds reliable automated machines for pipe cutting, idler welding, double end boring, and bearing pushing. The site is led by a Guided Machine Advisor that qualifies line needs, recommends the best-fit machine, and creates a tracked lead when commercial or engineering follow-up is needed.

slides.title: Precision ID Boring in Under 40 Seconds.
slides.summary: Simultaneous boring for repeatable accuracy across heavy-duty bearing housings.

slides.title: Rotary Welding in Under 40 Seconds.
slides.summary: Simultaneous dual-torch action for balanced thermal input and continuous production.

slides.title: 25-Second Taper-Free Pipe Cutting.
slides.summary: Fast, clean pipe preparation with stable clamping and repeatable edge quality.

slides.title: Precision Dual-End Bearing Pressing.
slides.summary: Controlled hydraulic pressure protects the seat while increasing assembly consistency.

title: Built around dependable industrial output, not brochure claims.
body: Welden Industries focuses on automation equipment for conveyor idler and allied production lines. We design machines that reduce manual variation, improve cycle consistency, and give production teams a more repeatable path from cutting and boring to welding and bearing assembly.
items: Automation-first machine design for repeatable, production-floor performance.
Built for manufacturers that need tighter tolerances, cleaner process flow, and less dependency on manual skill variation.
Machine range covers pipe cutting, idler welding, double end boring, and bearing pushing.
Commercial and technical discussions can start on the site and continue through tracked follow-up.

title: Four machines. Every stage of idler production.
body: From pipe cutting and boring to welding and bearing assembly - Welden's machines are engineered to work in sequence or stand alone. Each one removes a manual bottleneck, tightens tolerances, and keeps your line running at pace.

title: Machine cards
body: Controls whether the published machine cards appear on the homepage.

title: A first-pass digital sales engineer for your production line.
body: The Guided Machine Advisor asks progressive questions about process, material, throughput, bottlenecks, automation level, and urgency. It recommends only from approved Welden knowledge and creates a tracked lead when you need quotation or human support.

title: Need a quote, a human response, or technical clarity on a machine?
body: Fill in the form or use the chatbot. We'll get back to you within 2 working days.
items: Welden Industries, Garia Mahayatalla, Near Laskarpur Post Office, Kolkata 700153, West Bengal, India

title: Machine detail pages
body: Control the shared labels, card headings, and CTA copy used across public machine detail pages.
